metadata.title: Milk and Food Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Ultra-hygienic stainless steel milk cooling, storage, and process tanks fully compliant with food safety standards (FDA/GMP).

hero.title: Milk and Food Tanks
hero.desc: Zero-roughness surfaces preventing bacterial growth, high-insulation polyurethane, and stainless engineering suitable for food safety.

engineering.title: Ultra-Hygienic Engineering (FDA/GMP)
engineering.desc: The storage of milk, fruit juice, and delicate food products requires maximum hygiene. Welltech® milk tanks are designed to leave no blind spots (dead volume) inside. Weld seams are ground to a smoothness of Ra < 0.6 microns. Thus, there are no surfaces left for bacteria to cling to, and excellent cleaning is ensured thanks to integrated CIP (Clean-In-Place) balls.

items.2: 100% Washable (CIP) Inner Design with No Blind Spots
items.4: Rollbond (Laser Welded) or Half-Pipe Cooling/Heating Jacket
items.5: Low-Speed Scraper Agitators for Delicate Products

capacityTable.title: Standard Production Capacities
capacityTable.note: * Polyurethane insulation thicknesses (between 50mm - 100mm) can be optimized according to ambient temperature and product holding time.
capacityTable.customRow: For this capacity and larger milk silos, On-Site installation is provided.

items.q: How well does the insulation in milk tanks maintain heat?
items.a: Thanks to the high-density (40-42 kg/m³) polyurethane insulation we use, even if the outside temperature is 30°C, the product temperature inside the tank increases by a maximum of 1°C in 24 hours.

items.q: How is the cleaning (CIP) of the tanks ensured?
items.a: Thanks to the 360° rotating CIP spraying balls placed at the top of the tanks, the pressurized washing liquid homogeneously contacts all inner surfaces of the tank, offering a zero bacteria guarantee.
